Recursive or nested .brd inputs are out of scope unless owner policy explicitly authorizes recursion.
Existing packet folder collisions are stop blockers.

notes: Success classification is based on output existence plus completion and saved-to-disk markers plus zero detected errors.

classification_rules_applied: Output existence alone is not sufficient for success.
Success requires output existence, completion text, saved-to-disk text, and zero detected errors.

Missing output or missing completion/saved-to-disk confirmation or nonzero detected errors prevents success classification.
